title: Cog Foo
description:
Cog Foo is a builder–automation–action game that blends factory management, modular warfare, and industrial strategy.
Build factories to manufacture everything from machine parts to colossal modular tanks, then deploy your creations in battles to claim land, rescue survivors, and expand your industrial network.

🔧 Build & Automate

Design efficient production chains that transform raw resources into advanced components.
Set up conveyor belts, highlines, and machines to keep your factory running smoothly — every bullet, engine, and armor plate comes from your own production lines.
The more your systems automate, the more your survivors can focus on research, logistics, and building new facilities.

🚜 Manage Survivors

Gather survivors and put them to work in your growing colony. Keep them fed to maintain peak productivity — a well-fed workforce performs better, speeding up production and research across your colony.
As automation expands, shift your people from manual labor to research and infrastructure to accelerate your industrial growth.

🛠️ Command Modular and Support Tanks

Design and assemble modular tanks to lead your battles, backed by traditional support tanks you produce in your factories.
Your strategic choices — what to build, when to deploy, and how to prepare — define your readiness and directly influence battle outcomes.

⚔️ Fight on Your Terms

In Cog Foo, you control the pace of conflict. Build and optimize your base without pressure — battles only begin when you decide to engage. When you’re ready, unleash your machines to secure new territories, earn XP, and rescue more survivors for your cause.

🌍 Discover & Progress

Venture beyond your base to unlock new sectors filled with resources and missions that drive your growth.
Each victory expands your industrial reach, granting access to more space, technology, and production potential.
Water is scarce, land is valuable — every decision counts in your rise to dominance.

Key Features

• Deep factory-building and production automation

• Modular and support tank design

• Survivor management with food and research systems

• Tactical battles triggered on your schedule

• Sector-based progression and resource control

Build smarter, fight stronger, and grow your machine-driven empire — one cog at a time.
description_short: A battle-laden automation game where you have to manufacture everything from battle units down to every bullet! Engage in battles to gather survivors. Manage and feed your people. Mine, farm and Optimize production lines. Can you lead your people to victory?
